title: Vipul Kansal - Chief Executive Officer - Group Head at Ajanta Shoes | LinkedIn
snippet: As CEO, Vipul has propelled Ajanta Shoes to an impressive CAD 80 million in revenue, expanded its footprint to over 137 stores nationwide, and developed a vast network of more than 1,000 dealers and 20,000 retailers. A pioneer at the intersection of technology and fashion, Vipul championed the launch of *Impakto Navigator*—India’s first AI-powered smart shoe.
